# Miami Bankruptcy -- Chapter 7 & 13 Filing Guide [2026]
> Free Miami bankruptcy guide for 2026. Compare Chapter 7 vs Chapter 13, local exemptions, filing costs, means test, and what to expect in your case.

## About
miamibankruptcy.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Miami Bankruptcy -- Chapter 7 & 13 Filing Guide: https://miamibankruptcy.org/
- Chapter 7 Bankruptcy in Miami -- Eligibility, Exemptions, Timeline: https://miamibankruptcy.org/chapter-7.html
- Chapter 13 Bankruptcy in Miami -- Payment Plans, Dismissal Rates, Timeline: https://miamibankruptcy.org/chapter-13.html
- Florida Bankruptcy Exemptions -- What You Can Keep -- Miami: https://miamibankruptcy.org/exemptions.html
- How Much Does Bankruptcy Cost in Miami? -- Filing Fees, Attorney Fees: https://miamibankruptcy.org/cost.html
